name: Potato Pancakes German Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate raw potatoes into water to which lemon juice has been added.
2. Place the grated potatoes in a strainer or cheese cloth and drain off the liquid thoroughly.
3. Beat the boiled potato, egg, milk, and salt together to form a batter.
4. Using 3 tablespoons of oil for each batch, drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil in a large frying pan to form 3 or 4 pancakes at a time.
5. When the pancakes are firm on the bottom side, loosen the edges and turn them over.
6. Brown the other side of the pancakes.
7. Remove the cooked pancakes from the oil and drain on paper towels. Keep warm.
8. Repeat steps 4-7 until all the batter has been used.
9. Serve immediately. If served with meat, sprinkle with salt. If served with applesauce, sprinkle with sugar.
